[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000000000 a
1 0000000000 a
2 0000000000 a
3 0000000000 a
4 0000100001 2
5 0000110000 2
6 0000000000 a
7 0000010000 1

01 10 0010100000 2
12 21 0000100000 1
23 32 0000100000 1
34 43 0000010000 1 match 7
45 54 0000010000 1 match 7
56 65 0000001000 1
67 76 0011101101 6
70 07 0010100101 4

02 20 0000100001 2 match 4
13 31 0000110000 2 match 5
24 42 0000000000 a match 0 1 2 3 6
35 53 0000010000 1 match 7
46 64 1001000100 3
57 75 0000001000 1
60 06 0010100101 4
71 17 0010101000 3

03 30 0000100000 1
14 41 0000010000 1 match 7
25 52 0000000000 a match 0 1 2 3 6
36 63 0000100000 1
47 74 0001000100 2
50 05 0000000000 a match 0 1 2 3 6
61 16 0010101000 3
72 27 0000100001 2 match 4

04 40 0000000100 1
15 51 0000011000 2
26 62 0000100001 2 match 4
37 73 0000100000 1
